Poor Connection, Bad service...

UMobile’s service is a masterclass in mediocrity. In an era where seamless connectivity is a basic expectation, their network crawls at a prehistoric pace. It is utterly baffling how a telecommunications company can charge modern prices for a service that feels stuck in the dial-up age. The coverage is patchy at best, the data speeds are insultingly slow, and customer support feels more like an automated wall than actual assistance. As a consumer, it's not just disappointing — it's infuriating."
